title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo—get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python client and asyncio bindings for the Ollama HTTP API.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node and browsers (fetch-based).

title: langchain-ollama (PyPI)
summary: LangChain adapter providing Ollama LLM & embeddings components.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI (like ChatGPT) that proxies to a local Ollama instance.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built Rust CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with prompts, history, and repl.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub-Copilot-like pair programmer.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/JVM client library (Kotlin friendly) for Ollama with streaming and embeddings support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma + Streamlit for private document Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration by deepset-ai allowing Ollama models as generators & embedders.

title: ollama-n8n
summary: n8n community node to call Ollama models inside no-code workflows.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client library for Ollama with async streaming and dependency-injection helpers.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service + model cache for CI pipelines.

title: ollama-macos-menu
summary: Official macOS menu-bar app to start/stop Ollama and switch models from the toolbar.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds an Ollama sidebar for summarizing notes and Q&A.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Lightweight Telegram bot with group chat support and per-user model selection.

title: ollama-huggingface-hub
summary: Experimental bridge to pull and convert HF models into Ollama Modelfile format.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled AWS EC2 instances with Ollama pre-installed.
